ham.subject: Reminder: Semester Project Submission Deadline – 15th March
ham.body:
Dear Students,

I hope you are all doing well. This is a friendly reminder that the deadline for your semester project submissions is fast approaching. Please ensure that your final reports and accompanying code are uploaded to the course portal by **15th March, 11:59 PM**.

**Submission Guidelines**
- Format: PDF for the report, ZIP for the code.
- Include a brief README explaining your project's purpose, key algorithms, and any external libraries used.
- All files should be named using the convention: *[YourName]_[ProjectTitle].ext*.

If you anticipate any issues meeting the deadline, please email me no later than **10th March** so we can discuss possible extensions.

Thank you for your hard work and dedication. Looking forward to reviewing your projects!

Best regards,
Professor Emily Carter
Department of Computer Science
University of Example

spam.subject: Urgent: Income Tax Department Refund Verification Required
spam.body:
Dear Sir/Madam,

We are pleased to inform you that you have been selected for an $8,000 Income Tax Department refund. Your refund will be processed within 48 hours once we receive the required verification documents.

To proceed, please click on the button below and submit your bank account details and a copy of your latest tax return:

<URL>

**Important Notice**: Failure to provide the required information by **24th March** will result in forfeiture of the refund. If you do not comply, your account will be flagged for further investigation.

For any queries, contact the Income Tax Department at 1-800-123-4567 or reply to this email.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
Income Tax Department
